name: Canva
description: An intuitive online design platform that makes graphic design accessible to everyone with templates and drag-and-drop elements.
bestUseCase: Quick social media graphics, presentations, and posters
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Canva Pro starts at $12.99/month.

name: Figma
description: A collaborative web-based vector graphics editor and prototyping tool for modern interface design.
bestUseCase: UI/UX design, wireframing, and real-time collaborative design systems
pricingDetails: Free tier for individuals. Professional starts at $12/editor/month.

name: CapCut
description: An all-in-one video editing software that makes it incredibly simple to create visually striking videos.
bestUseCase: Short-form content, Reels, TikToks, and quick social media edits
pricingDetails: Free basic features. Pro starts at $7.99/month.

name: DaVinci Resolve
description: An industry-standard professional video editor combining editing, color correction, visual effects, and audio post-production.
bestUseCase: High-end cinematic video editing, professional color grading, and VFX
pricingDetails: Free version is fully featured. Studio edition is a $295 one-time fee.

name: Adobe Premiere Pro
description: A leading timeline-based video editing software application developed by Adobe Systems.
bestUseCase: Commercials, long-form films, and broadcast editing
pricingDetails: No free tier. Single app subscription is $22.99/month.

name: Descript
description: An audio/video editor that makes editing as easy as editing a text document. Edit video by editing text.
bestUseCase: Podcasts, talking-head videos, and screen recordings
pricingDetails: Free up to 1 hour/month. Creator plan starts at $12/month.
strengths: Transcribe and edit by deleting words
Studio sound quality with one click

name: Photopea
description: A free advanced photo editor that supports PSD, XCF, Sketch, XD and CDR formats directly in your browser.
bestUseCase: Free web-based Photoshop alternative for quick mockups and edits
pricingDetails: 100% free with non-intrusive ads. Ad-free starts at $5/month.
strengths: Supports PSD layer groups and styles

name: Visual Studio Code
description: A lightweight but powerful source code editor that runs on your desktop and comes with rich extensions.
bestUseCase: General purpose web development, scripting, and backend coding
pricingDetails: Completely free and open-source.

name: Cursor AI
description: An AI-first code editor designed to make programming extremely fast by embedding AI directly in the editing pane.
bestUseCase: AI-assisted coding, codebase search, and automated refactoring
pricingDetails: Free tier with limits. Pro plan is $20/month.

name: Replit
description: A collaborative browser-based IDE that lets you build, test, and deploy applications instantly without any local setup.
bestUseCase: Collaborative live-coding, quick prototyping, and zero-config deployment
pricingDetails: Free basic workspace. Core starts at $10/month.
strengths: Deploy web projects in one click

name: LeetCode
description: The ultimate platform for preparing for technical coding interviews, offering tons of algorithmic exercises.
bestUseCase: Coding interview preparation and algorithm practice
pricingDetails: Free access to most problems. Premium is $35/month.

name: Notion
description: A unified workspace where you can write, plan, collaborate, and get organized. Customize tables, wikis, and notes.
bestUseCase: Notes, database tracking, workspace wiki, and project coordination
pricingDetails: Free for personal use. Plus plan is $8/user/month.

name: Obsidian
description: A powerful, local-first markdown note-taking app that acts as a second brain by linking files in a visual graph.
bestUseCase: Deep research, personal knowledge management, and offline note-taking
pricingDetails: Completely free for personal use. Sync is $4/month.

name: Trello
description: A simple, flexible, and visual Kanban board system that helps teams manage projects and organize workflow steps.
bestUseCase: Visual task tracking and lightweight project coordination
pricingDetails: Free for up to 10 boards. Standard starts at $5/user/month.

name: Epidemic Sound
description: A premium royalty-free music and sound effects platform for video creators and broadcasters.
bestUseCase: Copyright-free background music and sound design for YouTube and ads
pricingDetails: Personal plan starts at $9.99/month. 30-day free trial.

name: Pixabay Music
description: A massive royalty-free audio library offering completely free tracks and sound effects for visual creators.
bestUseCase: Completely free soundtracks and sound effects with zero attribution
pricingDetails: 100% free for commercial and non-commercial projects.

name: ElevenLabs
description: The most advanced generative AI speech and voice cloning software designed to render highly realistic voices.
bestUseCase: Voiceovers, audiobooks, talking-head translations, and digital narrator speech
pricingDetails: Free tier with 10,000 characters/month. Paid starts at $5/month.

name: ChatGPT
description: A conversational AI chatbot designed by OpenAI capable of text generation, coding, brainstorming, and translation.
bestUseCase: Copywriting, outlining, brainstorming, and general explanation
pricingDetails: Free GPT-3.5 access. Plus GPT-4 plan is $20/month.

name: Midjourney
description: An AI image generation model hosted on Discord that generates stunning photorealistic and artistic illustrations from text.
bestUseCase: Conceptual art, graphic illustrations, stock aesthetics, and textures
pricingDetails: No free tier. Standard subscription starts at $10/month.
strengths: Vast range of complex artistic styles

name: Gamma App
description: An AI presentation builder that drafts gorgeous slide decks, webpages, and document briefs from a single prompt.
bestUseCase: Quick interactive slide decks, newsletters, and briefing notes
pricingDetails: Free tier with 400 credits. Plus starts at $8/month.
strengths: Builds modern slides from raw text
Exportable to PPT and PDF formats

name: Pitch
description: A collaborative presentation deck builder built to give teams a professional edge with premium layouts and animations.
bestUseCase: Startup pitch decks, stakeholder reporting, and polished slides
pricingDetails: Free basic workspace. Pro starts at $17/month.

name: FlowCV
description: An interactive, visual resume editor that helps users construct multi-page job-winning resumes in minutes.
bestUseCase: Crafting clean ATS-friendly designer resumes for corporate applications
pricingDetails: Free for 1 resume. Paid starts at $5/month.

name: Reactive Resume
description: A free open-source resume builder that gives users total control over their data, privacy, and layouts.
bestUseCase: Completely free customizable CV writing with zero tracking or costs
pricingDetails: 100% free and open-source forever.

name: Unsplash
description: A premier source of freely-usable images, containing millions of high-resolution digital photographs.
bestUseCase: High-fidelity digital stock photography for sites and blogs
pricingDetails: Free download license. Unsplash+ starts at $4/month.

name: LottieFiles
description: A platform offering lightweight, interactive JSON/DotLottie animations for digital products and landing pages.
bestUseCase: Adding responsive web-ready interactive micro-animations to sites
pricingDetails: Free access to thousands of assets. Pro is $19/month.

name: Rive
description: A real-time interactive design and animation tool that lets you build responsive vector graphics with state machines.
bestUseCase: Interactive game interfaces, dynamic application buttons, and stateful loops
pricingDetails: Free up to 3 files. Pro starts at $24/month.
strengths: Runs at a solid 120 FPS on screen

name: Blender
description: A free open-source 3D creation suite supporting modeling, rigging, animation, rendering, simulation, and compositing.
bestUseCase: Professional 3D models, visual assets, game assets, and VFX
pricingDetails: Completely free and open-source.

name: Remove.bg
description: An AI-powered tool that removes the background of any photo automatically with high precision in one click.
bestUseCase: Quick portrait background transparency mapping
pricingDetails: Free for low-res results. HD downloads require credits.

name: FlowCV (Cover Letters)
description: An expansion of the FlowCV suite that leverages templates to construct outstanding, ATS-optimized cover letters.
bestUseCase: Tailoring custom application cover letters for career shifts
pricingDetails: Free basic draft tools.
strengths: Seamlessly syncs with your FlowCV resume

name: Phind
description: An AI search engine specialized for software developers that provides answers along with related code blocks.
bestUseCase: Debugging, library lookups, and coding synthesis
pricingDetails: Free basic searches. Pro plan is $20/month.

name: Audacity
description: A free open-source multi-track audio editor and recorder designed to edit podcasts and waveforms.
bestUseCase: Simple audio recording, splicing, and basic vocal cleanup
pricingDetails: Completely free open-source.
strengths: Massive array of basic audio plugins

name: VLC Media Player
description: A free open-source cross-platform multimedia player that plays almost all media formats and files.
bestUseCase: Playing uncompressed high-bitrate video clips offline
pricingDetails: 100% free and open-source.

name: Lottie Creator
description: An intuitive in-browser editing tool designed to craft Lottie animations without deep After Effects training.
bestUseCase: Rapid micro-animations and motion design in the browser
pricingDetails: Free tier available.
strengths: Export vector graphics to JSON files

name: Slack
description: A highly integrated communication hub that centralizes team channels, DMs, and third-party applications.
bestUseCase: SaaS startup communication and remote office collaboration
pricingDetails: Free history limits. Paid starts at $7.25/month.

name: tldraw
description: A delightful collaborative vector drawing canvas that runs instantly in any browser window.
bestUseCase: Quick visual brainstorm sketches and interactive wireframing
pricingDetails: Completely free open-source editor tool.

name: Excalidraw
description: A virtual whiteboard that lets you easily sketch diagrams that have a hand-drawn feel.
bestUseCase: Software design architecture maps and rapid whiteboard drafting
pricingDetails: Free open-source web application.
